abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

abilities.name: Thrown Overboard
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, make a Tide marker in base contact and heal 2.

triggers.name: Mental Trauma
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or be dealt 3 damage.

triggers.name: Whirlpool
triggers.text: Enemy models within 1" of the target are placed within 3" of this model.

actions.name: Fishin' with Dynamite
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (X)1" of the target. For each raise this action receives, increase the range of the (X) by +1".

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Friendly Waters
triggers.text: This model gains a Drift token.

actions.name: "Fish On!"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Move either the target or this model up to 4" toward the other.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Silurid Stomp
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Then, enemy models within (X)1" must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Gone Fishin'
triggers.text: Make a Tide marker in base contact with this model.
